macro.title: Former Stockton Mortgage employees, Novus deny trade secret allegations
macro.what: In an Alabama federal court, 18 defendants and Novus denied Stockton Mortgage trade secrets and interference allegations.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Mortgage rates rise past 6.75% as inflation uncertainty persists
macro.what: 30-year conforming rates averaged 6.77%, with jumbo at 6.75%, as Fed messaging stayed hawkish and 1-year inflation expectations rose to 3.7%.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Monthly Payments Tick Up For First Time in 8 Months As Home Prices Hit Record High
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: North Carolina kicks parking rules to the curb in statewide reform
housing.what: North Carolina housing advocates have tried for years to pass state-level zoning reform
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Zillow, MRED, Compass await ruling in Chicagoland MLS fight
housing.what: The court is reviewing Zillow’s request to block MRED from suspending listing feeds as post-hearing briefs are filed.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: One Raven launches local-first smart home array for homebuilders
housing.what: One Raven has launched a new smart home operating system designed to keep most home automation functions local to the property rather than dependent on cloud connectivity, according to a company announcement
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Survey: nearly nine in 10 voters support the ‘ROAD Act’ in limbo
housing.what: A poll of 800 registered voters found 89% support the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act and its main provisions
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Finance of America expands HomeSafe Second reverse mortgage to four new markets
housing.what: Finance of America expanded HomeSafe Second into four new markets, bringing availability to a total of 18 states and Washington, D.C.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Luxury Homes Cost 9 Times More Than the Typical Homes in These South Florida “Wealth Magnet” Metros
housing.what: West Palm Beach, FL, where the typical luxury home costs 8.9 times more than the typical non luxury home, has the nation’s biggest luxury home price premium
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: Most Homeowners See Their Home as a Reflection of Who They Are; Most Renters See It as Just a Place To Live
housing.what: In recognition of National Homeownership Month in June, we surveyed American homeowners about how their homes and neighborhoods make them feel
housing.why: Rent moves feed shelter inflation and multifamily fundamentals.
housing.market: Rising rents help MF REITs; falling rents ease inflation but pressure NOI.

notables.title: Compass adds RealTrends Verified Palm Beach agent Daniel Ekerold
notables.what: Compass adds Palm Beach agent Daniel Ekerold from Douglas Elliman after eight sides and $17.84M volume in 2025, per RealTrends.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Realtors slam focus on trademark policing: ‘Is this really the next hill NAR is going to stand on?’
notables.what: NAR’s Realtor trademark enforcement push drew backlash from members who want action on lawsuits, MLS rules and trust.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: AI use widespread in real estate, but most professionals say it falls short
notables.what: Despite widespread adoption, only 35% of respondents said AI is genuinely helpful, the largest among industries analyzed in a recent report.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.
